title: Meet Gismo!
description: GEORGE NEWS - This sweet-natured pup is...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - This sweet-natured pup is about 6 months old and looking for a loving forever home. Gismo was surrendered because his previous yard was too small for him - though he’s only a small to medium breed, he still deserves space to play and grow.


> Since arriving at the Garden Route SPCA, Gismo has adjusted beautifully.


He gets along well with other dogs and has a gentle, unassuming nature that makes him the perfect companion. With his kind temperament and friendly attitude, he would make a wonderful addition to a family.If you're looking for a loyal, easygoing young dog to welcome into your heart and home, Gismo might be the one!Contact the Garden Route SPCA on 044 878 1990 for more information or to arrange a visit.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
